'''Garnak Fey''' was the head of the [[Fey family]] and the [[comptroller]] of the [[Silica Tab]] production lines, which were the main source of income for the family-owned organization.

==Biography==
He was also a major impact on the government of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. Some time after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Fey was captured by [[Silri]] of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
